compiled_state.description:
# Decompose transition_compute (237-LOC / 10-param orchestrator)

## What
`_commands/transition.py:329-565` inlines plan-review gate, parent cascade, open-children guard, completion precheck, signing, force-close audit, compact+scratch+push. Extract `_close_ticket(...)` (the close-path tail) and `_cascade_open_parent(...)` (mirroring claim_compute), keeping `transition_compute` a ~80-LOC ordered sequencer. Preserve the verify->close->sign ordering invariant.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `_close_ticket` + `_cascade_open_parent` extracted; `transition_compute` is a thin sequencer.
- [ ] The ordering invariant + all transition/close/cascade tests pass unchanged.
- [ ] `make lint` passes; commit carries a `rebar-ticket:` trailer.
